name: Test Aufträge
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    # Define columns for the report
    columns = get_columns()
    
    # Fetch data with debugging
    data = get_data(filters)
    
    # Print the data to debug
    print("Data fetched from SQL query:", data)
    
    return columns, data

def get_columns():
    return [
        {"label": "Sales Order", "fieldname": "sales_order", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Sales Order", "width": 150},
        {"label": "Customer", "fieldname": "customer", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "Customer", "width": 150},
        {"label": "Order Date", "fieldname": "order_date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Status", "fieldname": "status", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 100},
        {"label": "Total Amount", "fieldname": "total_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency", "width": 120},
    ]

def get_data(filters):
    # Handle filters
    conditions = ""
    if filters:
        filters = frappe.parse_json(filters)
        if filters.get('date'):
            conditions += " AND so.transaction_date >= '{}'".format(filters['date'])
    
    # Define SQL query
    query = """
        SELECT
            so.name AS sales_order,
            so.customer AS customer,
            so.transaction_date AS order_date,
            so.status AS status,
            so.base_grand_total AS total_amount
        FROM
            `tabSales Order` so
        WHERE
            so.status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Closed', 'Completed')
            {conditions}
        ORDER BY
            so.transaction_date DESC
    """.format(conditions=conditions)
    
    # Print the query to debug
    print("Executing SQL Query:", query)
    
    # Execute SQL query
    data = frappe.db.sql(query, as_dict=True)
    
    # Print the data fetched from the SQL query for debugging
    print("Data fetched from SQL query:", data)
    
    return data
